auth.subLogin: Your instance is ready. Sign in to your control plane.
auth.subRegister: Solo today, teams next. Spin up your first project in under a minute.
auth.forgotPlaceholder: Password reset is not available on this single-host POC. Ask an admin to reset it.
auth.remember: Keep me signed in for 30 days on this device
auth.terms: I'm OK with operating a POC release on a single host.
auth.hintPwd: Use 12+ characters with a mix of letters, numbers and symbols
auth.errorDuplicate: An account with this email already exists.
auth.errorWeak: Password must be at least 12 characters.
auth.errorPending: This account is waiting for admin approval.
auth.errorDisabled: This account is disabled. Ask an admin to re-enable it.
auth.registerPending: Account created. An admin must activate it before you can sign in.
auth.strength0: Use 12+ characters with a mix of letters, numbers and symbols
auth.strength2: OK · add a digit or symbol for stronger.

side.spineH3rest: Backlog → merge, with actions and decisions history.
side.spineSub: Projects, tasks, agents, humans — and every handoff between. HITL where it counts. Autonomy where you trust it.

portfolio.heading: Projects.
portfolio.subheading: {projects} repos under management. {workspaces} workspaces in flight. {needs} things waiting on you.
portfolio.ticker: {projects} projects · {workspaces} workspaces in flight · {needs} waiting on you
portfolio.launchUnavailableHint: Launches pause until the supervisor is ready.
portfolio.newProjectSub: connect a repo · scaffold a new one
portfolio.emptyBody: MAIster manages repos, runs, and agents for you. Point us at a git remote or a folder — we'll do the rest.
portfolio.esTip1: ⌘L launches a run once the supervisor is ready.
portfolio.esTip2: Each run lives in its own worktree — diff and merge with proof.
portfolio.esTip3: Active runs stay pinned to the rail, always one click away.

scratch.newSubtitle: Open a conversation-style coding agent session outside the task board, with its own worktree, branch, attachments, and capability profile.
scratch.prompt: What do you want to do?
scratch.promptPlaceholder: Describe the change, investigation, or experiment.
scratch.fileSummary: {count, plural, one {# file} other {# files}}, {bytes} bytes
scratch.messagePlaceholder: Continue the conversation with the coding agent.
scratch.messageDisabled: This run is not waiting for user input.
scratch.recoverPlaceholder: Tell the resumed agent what to do next.

board.launchSupervisorUnavailable: Supervisor unavailable. Start or recover the supervisor daemon, then retry.
board.prsDeferred: Pull-request sync isn't wired up on this POC yet.
board.mcpsDeferred: MCP server management isn't wired up on this POC yet.
board.defaultAgentDesc: used for new runs unless overridden per-task

projects.addSub: Clone a Git repo by URL, or point MAIster at an existing local repo. Either must contain a maister.yaml.
projects.sourceHint: Provide a Git URL to clone, or a name/path for an existing local repo.
projects.warnUrlCreds: This URL embeds credentials — they'll be stored as entered. Prefer host SSH keys or a git credential helper.
projects.errorConflict: A project with this slug or repo path is already registered.
projects.errorInstall: A configured Flow plugin failed to install.
projects.errorForbidden: Only an admin can register a project.
projects.errorClone: Couldn't clone or resolve the repository. Check the URL or path and host git credentials.
projects.warnNotGit: Registered, but the repo has no remote — pull-request promotion won't work until you add one.
projects.warnInitialized: Registered and a new git repo was initialized — make an initial commit before launching runs.

settings.title: Settings
settings.forbidden: Only an admin can view settings.
settings.envNote: Read-only — set via MAISTER_REPOS_ROOT and MAISTER_WORKTREES_ROOT.

run.noPending: No input is pending for this run.
run.responseHint: Enter a JSON value matching the requested schema below.
run.returnNotOwner: Only the reviewer who claimed this run can return it.
run.settingsDeclaredIntentNote: Declared intent, shown for visibility. In this build settings are recorded only — they are not yet enforced or delivered to the agent (materialized in M14).
run.crashRecoverableHint: A checkpoint survived. You can recover the run or discard its workspace.
run.notRecoverable: This run cannot be recovered — discard its workspace to free the branch.
run.recoverConfirmBody: Recovery re-runs the current node from its last checkpoint. Work already saved to the worktree is kept, but the node executes again from the start.
run.recoverQueued: The host is at capacity — recovery is queued and will resume when a slot frees.
run.recoverConflict: This run can no longer be recovered. Refresh and discard its workspace instead.
run.recoverGone: The checkpoint is gone — this run can only be discarded now.
run.recoverRetry: The supervisor is temporarily unavailable. Try again in a moment.
run.recoverError: Recovery failed. Try again, or discard the workspace.
run.discardConfirmBody: Discarding abandons the run and schedules its worktree for removal. This cannot be undone.

changePassword.title: Change your password
changePassword.sub: Your account requires a new password before you can continue.
changePassword.hint: Use 12+ characters with a mix of letters, numbers and symbols
changePassword.errorWeak: Password must be at least 12 characters.
changePassword.errorMismatch: The two passwords do not match.
changePassword.errorGeneric: Could not update the password. Try again.

account.title: Personal settings
account.sub: Manage the details attached to your signed-in MAIster account.
account.profileSub: This name appears in the shell and project activity.
account.profileError: Enter a display name between 1 and 120 characters.
account.passwordSub: Set a new password for this account. Use at least 12 characters.
account.passwordHint: Use 12+ characters with a mix of letters, numbers and symbols
account.passwordWeak: Password must be at least 12 characters.
account.passwordMismatch: The two passwords do not match.
account.passwordError: Could not update the password. Try again.

adminUsers.title: User management
adminUsers.sub: Approve new registrations, adjust global roles, disable access, and reset passwords.
adminUsers.tableSub: Pending users cannot sign in until an admin activates them.

packages.title: Flow Packages
packages.empty: No Flow packages installed for this project.
packages.adminOnly: Package management requires the admin project role.
